actions.label:   Wi-Fi
actions.command: sh -c 'if [ "$SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE" = true ]; then nmcli radio wifi on; else nmcli radio wifi off; fi'
actions.update-command: sh -c 'LC_ALL=C nmcli radio wifi | grep -Fxq enabled && echo true || echo false'

actions.label:   Bluetooth
actions.command: sh -c 'if [ "$SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE" = true ]; then bluetoothctl power on; else bluetoothctl power off; fi'
actions.update-command: sh -c 'LC_ALL=C bluetoothctl show | grep -Fq "Powered: yes" && echo true || echo false'

actions.label: 󰖔  Night Light
actions.command: sh -c 'if [ "$SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE" = true ]; then systemctl --user start hyprsunset-quick.service; else systemctl --user stop hyprsunset-quick.service; fi'
actions.update-command: sh -c 'systemctl --user is-active --quiet hyprsunset-quick.service && echo true || echo false'
